2606.22330.title: Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization for LLM Agents
2606.22330.paper_summary: External skills can improve action-oriented LLM agents without changing model weights, but persistent skill updates are risky when they are distilled from sparse or noisy trajectories. A plausible reflection may encode a useful procedure, a spurious shortcut, or a rule that the target executor cannot reliably follow. We propose Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization (HDSO), a train-free framework in which both the skill curator and the agent executor are frozen inference endpoints. The curator observes executor traces, proposes a falsifiable hypothesis with an explicit validation plan, instantiates the hypothesis as a candidate skill package, validates the package through paired control/treatment executions, reviews behavior differences, and consolidates only supported candidates into an approved repository. The executor consumes approved skills through progressive disclosure, preserving the executor-only path when no skill is selected. On ALFWorld, HDSO improves executor-only baselines by +6.9 Avg. SR points for Qwen3-8B and +4.0 points for Qwen3.6-27B. Under 20% randomly flipped success/failure feedback during skill discovery and validation, HDSO preserves a +7.1-point gain for Qwen3-8B. Transfer and heterogeneous-pair diagnostics further show that validated repositories can be useful beyond the run that produced them, but cross-model curation succeeds only when curator diagnosis, executor capability, and validation evidence align. HDSO provides an auditable skill lifecycle for frozen action agents rather than an unconstrained memory accumulation procedure.
2606.22330.paper_summary_zh: 外部技能可以在不改變模型權重的情況下改善以行動為導向的LLM代理，但當技能更新源自稀疏或噪聲軌跡時，持續的技能更新是有風險的。一個合理的反思可能編碼了一個有用的程序、一個虛假的捷徑，或一條目標執行者無法可靠遵循的規則。我們提出了假設驅動的技能優化（HDSO），這是一個無需訓練的框架，其中技能策劃者和代理執行者都是固定的推理端點。策劃者觀察執行者的痕跡，提出一個可證偽的假設，並附上明確的驗證計劃，將假設實例化為候選技能包，通過配對的控制/處理執行來驗證該包，審查行為差異，並僅將支持的候選者整合到經批准的庫中。執行者通過漸進式披露消耗經批准的技能，當未選擇任何技能時，保留執行者專用的路徑。在ALFWorld上，HDSO使執行者專用的基準提高了+6.9的平均成功率點數（SR）對於Qwen3-8B，並對於Qwen3.6-27B提高了+4.0點。在技能發現和驗證過程中，隨機翻轉20%的成功/失敗反饋下，HDSO為Qwen3-8B保留了+7.1點的增益。轉移和異質配對診斷進一步顯示，經驗證的庫在產生它們的運行之外也可以是有用的，但跨模型的策劃僅在策劃者診斷、執行者能力和驗證證據一致時成功。HDSO為固定的行動代理提供了一個可審計的技能生命周期，而不是一個不受限制的記憶累積程序。
2606.22330.author: Fangxin Shang et.al.
